questions.question:
A pod debug diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `debug-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `debug-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetPod` is `orders-api`
- `podInventory` is `kubectl get pod orders-api -n debug-lab -o wide`
- `containerInventory` is `kubectl get pod orders-api -n debug-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[*].name}'`
- `logsCheck` is `kubectl logs orders-api -n debug-lab -c api --tail=50`
- `nodeCheck` is `kubectl get pod orders-api -n debug-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.nodeName}'`
- `debugCommand` is `kubectl debug pod/orders-api -n debug-lab -it --image=busybox:1.36 --target=api`
- `ephemeralContainerCheck` is `kubectl get pod orders-api -n debug-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.ephemeralContainers[*].name}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n debug-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm target pod, target container, debug image, and ephemeral container evidence before changing workload manifests`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/debug-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/debug-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Pod Inventory`, `Debug Path`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete the Pod, do not restart the workload, and do not patch the live Pod spec during this drill.

verification.description: The debug diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended pod target, exact pod inspection commands, kubectl debug invocation, ephemeral container evidence, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact pod inventory, debug, logs, events, and safe review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe pod-debug remediation guidance is removed
